title: heliophila lactea
intro: Heliophila lactea, also known as milk and gold or white milk and gold, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Heliophila lactea is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and potentially supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
